policy_intent: Restrict crawling to specific URL paths

robots_mechanism: Crawl-delay (non-standard, widely ignored, not in RFC 9309)
cpnp_mechanism: max_crawl_rate, enforced via signed token + middleware

policy_intent: Permit access by declared purpose (research vs AI training)
robots_mechanism: No purpose concept exists in robots.txt

policy_intent: Bind access to a verifiable operator identity
cpnp_mechanism: W3C Verifiable Credential issued by trusted CA

policy_intent: Restrict downstream data use (no AI training)
cpnp_mechanism: data_use_restrictions in Policy Manifest + token claim

policy_intent: Prohibit commercial resale of crawled data
Produce a non-repudiable record of agreement

cpnp_mechanism: Token signature verified on every request; 451 on violation

policy_intent: Provide an auditable per-request compliance trail
cpnp_mechanism: SQLite audit log keyed by crawler DID + token
Optional compensation terms in Policy Manifest (extensible)
